label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The user provided a passage about body language in the office and is asking for the best title. The options are A, B, C, D. First, I need to understand the main idea of the passage. The passage starts by explaining how body language is powerful and that words only account for a small part. Then it lists specific mistakes to avoid in office settings. The tips given are about not touching co-workers, maintaining eye contact, having a good handshake, and not leaning the head while listening. So the focus is on correct body language practices specifically in the office. Looking at the options: A) Pay attention to your body language at the office. This seems directly related because the passage is about what not to do in the office, so a title about paying attention to body language there fits. B) How to get along with your co-workers. While the passage does mention interactions with co-workers, the main focus is on body language, not general tips on getting along. So B might be a bit too broad. C) The meaning of body language you should know. This is more general and doesn't specify the office setting, which the passage is focused on. The passage isn't just about
